latest_outcome.note: The backend-neutral runtime loop proof completed with auditable allocation, execution, review, and outcome artifacts.

latest_self_audit.summary: One end-to-end runtime proof loop completed and should now be tightened into a release-grade major version gate.
latest_self_audit.detected_gap: The proof is deterministic and local; broader backend-family evidence is still a release follow-up.
latest_self_audit.next_action: Expand the same auditable loop shape across additional backend families without changing the contract layer.

current_next_value_slice.content: Operationalize the review-validity and orchestrator runtime-discipline benchmark artifact sets before any new v3.x release tag.

improvement_proposal.proposed_focus: Expand the same auditable loop shape across additional backend families without changing the contract layer.
